title: verbena litoralis var. caracasana
intro: Verbena litoralis var. caracasana, also known as Caracas verbena, is a variety of the Verbena litoralis plant, a flowering plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Caracas verbena include its use in treating fever, coughs, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress. Caracas verbena can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
